Default Prove-Up
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Deborah Neville.
George L. Cohn, Esq. for Plaintiff Sallie Mae Servicing L.P.
Plaintiff's witness, Ruth Harris was sworn & examined.
Plaintiff's Exhibits #1,2,3-Promissory Notes, #4-The $36,000.00 balance and Interest-ID/EVID.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff and against the defendant Lisa A. Pinkston.
Principal of $36,233.63
Prejudgment interest $12,621.11
Attorney's fees of $2,555.00
Costs of $284.45
For the total of $51,694.19
Counsel stipulated for return of the Exhibits and prepare the proper Judgment.
